visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in an indoor Costco warehouse. A young woman with a joyful expression, bright eyes, and fair skin is centered in the frame. She is wearing a tan bucket hat and a cream-colored sleeveless dress with ruffled shoulders. She holds a large white cardboard box containing six round pistachio chiffon cakes, each topped with a swirl of light green cream. The background is a brightly lit, slightly blurred supermarket aisle with metal shelves and refrigeration units. Bold text overlays in red and yellow appear on screen. (2) The scene cuts to a closer view of the woman still inside the warehouse. She points with her index finger toward a stack of cake boxes on a refrigerated shelf, highlighting the product. The lighting remains bright and industrial. (3) The setting changes to an indoor home living room. The woman is now seated at a marble-textured table, holding a single cake. She has changed her headwear to a pinkish-tan beret. The background environment is cozy, featuring a light-colored sofa and decorative items under warm indoor lighting. (4) An extreme close-up shot focuses on the cake placed on a light-colored wooden cutting board. A pink plastic knife is used to slice the sponge cake in half, revealing a rich, vibrant light green pistachio cream center. The texture of the cake is visibly soft and airy. The woman's hands are the primary focus as she displays the cross-section to the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 只要50元!. [Variety]: 好吃嗎?. [Slogan]: 開心果. [Slogan]: 迷你戚風蛋糕. (2) [Subtitle]: 開心. (3) [Subtitle]: 它做的好漂亮哦. (4) [Subtitle]: 你看它上面的奶油. (5) [Subtitle]: 哇. (6) [Subtitle]: 然後每一個. (7) [Subtitle]: 跟拳頭一樣大!. (8) [Subtitle]: 299有6個 所以一個是50塊. (9) [Subtitle]: 回去吃看看. (10) [Subtitle]: 哎呦 數學小天才. (11) [Subtitle]: 喜歡吃傳統蛋糕 戚風蛋糕的人. (12) [Subtitle]: 注意了 這一款你一定要買. (13) [Subtitle]: 好市多一個那麼大. (14) [Subtitle]: 一個只要50元. (15) [Subtitle]: 而且它的空氣感十足. (16) [Subtitle]: 吃起來真的是非常的Q彈. (17) [Subtitle]: 開心果的味道不會很重. (18) [Subtitle]: 你可以把它當做成濕潤的奶油. (19) [Subtitle]: 讓整個蛋糕吃完嘴巴也不會乾. (20) [Subtitle]: 不搭配茶也很好吃. (21) [Subtitle]: 推薦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator is featured throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair and bangs, wearing a cream-colored sleeveless dress and alternating between a tan bucket hat and a pinkish-tan beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background transitions from the industrial, shelf-lined aisles of a Costco warehouse to a domestic living room with a couch, dog bed, and soft home decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo electronic BGM starts immediately with a bright synth melody and driving drum beat. A 'pop' sound effect marks the beginning as the female narrator introduces the pistachio chiffon cakes with high arousal and a cheerful, high-pitched vocal delivery. (2) A subtle 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates the transition as the narrator quickly calculates the unit price of the cakes. Her speech is fast and clear, overlapping perfectly with the steady rhythm of the major-mode music. (3) The acoustic environment shifts slightly to a less reverberant room tone as the speaker begins her detailed review. The BGM maintains its energy, with electronic percussion providing a vibrant backdrop. The narrator's tone remains friendly and highly enthusiastic. (4) Soft, incidental sounds of a plastic knife cutting through the sponge cake are barely audible beneath the narration. The narrator describes the texture and taste with expressive vocal inflections. The audio ends with a quick hard cut as the narrator delivers a final recommendation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Showcase -> Pricing -> Detailed Review -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review and recommend a specific Costco bakery product, the pistachio chiffon cake, by highlighting its low price (50 TWD per unit) and demonstrating its soft texture and flavorful filling to attract budget-conscious food enthusiasts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator prominently displays the brand (Costco), the price, and provides a highly positive, detailed review of the specific product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses high-energy editing, bright visuals, and clear audio cues to create a compelling short-form food review suitable for social media platforms like TikTok or Instagram Reels.
